channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Nvidia's new PC chips represent CEO Huang's bid to win at every layer of AI stack
item.description: Nvidia's announced entry into the PC chip market sent shares of AMD, Intel and Qualcomm lower as Wall Street recognized the threat.

item.title: Alphabet plans to raise $80 billion from stock sales to fund AI build-out
item.description: Alphabet said it plans to sell $80 billion in stock, including through a $10 billion investment by Berkshire Hathaway.

item.title: Victoria Secret shares spike 40% after big earnings beat, raised sales outlook
item.description: Victoria's Secret has been in the midst of a turnaround under CEO Hillary Super, who said the company is winning over young shoppers across all incomes.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Marvell Technology, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Victoria's Secret & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

item.title: Polymarket closes its first block trade as prediction markets push for Wall Street adoption
item.description: Prediction market platforms have increasingly looked to institutional traders, not individual ones, as the next venue for growth.

item.title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Alphabet, Ferrari, Take-Two, TripAdvisor & more
item.description: Here are Tuesday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

item.title: Software stocks just passed a big milestone
item.description: Software stocks are making a comeback from their artificial intelligence-driven sell-off earlier this year.

item.title: HPE skyrockets 30% on biggest earnings beat since 2018
item.description: HPE's blowout second-quarter earnings report was highlighted by a strong Cloud & AI segment that showed soaring server revenue.

item.title: Berkshire Hathaway invests extra $10 billion in Alphabet, deepening bet on AI
item.description: The deal builds on a stake Berkshire has steadily expanded since late 2025, making Alphabet one of its biggest recent bets.

item.title: Trump tells CNBC: 'I don't care' if Iran negotiations are over
item.description: President Trump spoke with CNBC's Eamon Javers about the latest with the Iran war in an interview Monday.

item.title: Audemars Piguet's watch prices remain stable after controversial Swatch collab
item.description: The Royal Pop collection of brightly colored watches on lanyards is part of AP's longer-term strategy of attracting the next generation of collectors.

item.title: NBA star Stephen Curry partners with Chinese sportswear giant Li-Ning
item.description: Stephen Curry has entered into a partnership with Li-Ning, which would involve product development as well as sports culture initiatives.

item.title: Nuclear weapons could soon be hosted in more NATO nations — what it means for defense stocks
item.description: The U.S. is reportedly exploring plans to expand its nuclear weapons-hosting arrangements to include more NATO countries in Europe.

item.title: Can markets suffer from too much of a good thing?
item.description: The market’s extraordinary run to new highs over the past two months has been carried by an array of upbeat fundamental factors and favorable macro conditions.

item.title: The stock market just did something eerily similar to the dot-com bubble top in 2000
item.description: Surging stock performance in May was concentrated in the AI adjacent.

item.title: This medtech stock began trading less than a month ago. Goldman Sachs thinks it could double
item.description: The investment bank initiated coverage of the neurostimulation therapy developer with a buy rating.

item.title: Homeowners insurance premiums have soared in recent years. How to reduce your costs
item.description: Insurance premiums have soared for many homeowners in recent years, but there are steps policyholders can take to reduce them, experts said.

item.title: Biotech takeover target Abivax sinks over 30% as cancer cases cloud trial data for bowel disease drug
item.description: A clinical trial update wiped out billions in the French company's market cap and raised questions over a potential takeover.

item.title: Blue Origin launchpad damaged in rocket explosion may not be restored until 2028, NASA's Isaacman says
item.description: NASA has tapped Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin for several contracts in the agency's Artemis return-to-the-moon program.

item.title: Microsoft and Google are late to AI coding, but 'absolutely critical' they compete for growth
item.description: Coding tools are becoming an increasingly big target for Google and Microsoft as they try to catch up to Anthropic and OpenAI.

item.title: Stock market corrections will happen: Here's how we navigate the ups and downs
item.description: We concern ourselves far more with making sure we are investing in the right companies.

item.title: Student loans are easier than ever to get discharged in bankruptcy. You should still try these 5 alternatives first
item.description: Biden-era guidance streamlined the bankruptcy process for student loan borrowers. But that doesn't make it a no-brainer.

item.title: Amazon's four-day Prime Day event starts June 23, as shoppers battle inflation
item.description: Amazon's four-day shopping fest comes after U.S. consumer sentiment dropped in May to a record low.

item.title: U.S. jury finds investor Andrew Left guilty of securities fraud
item.description: Authorities alleged Left manipulated the stock market and defrauded investors with misleading claims about his positions in stocks including Nvidia and Tesla.

item.title: Blackstone closes its largest Asia private equity fund at over $13 billion
item.description: Blackstone raised $13.1 billion for its latest Asia private equity vehicle, marking the largest private equity fundraise the firm has done in the region.

item.title: Trump administration proposes 25% tariff on Brazilian goods over unfair trade practices
item.description: U.S Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said that the investigation under Section 301 was launched at the direction of U.S. President Donald Trump.

item.title: Treasury yields fall as investors pin hopes on Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire
item.description: U.S. Treasury yields fell on Tuesday, following global yields lower after Lebanon announced a ceasefire between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.

item.title: Anthropic confidentially files IPO prospectus with SEC, prepping Wall Street for landmark AI deal
item.description: Anthropic said it confidentially filed its IPO prospectus with the SEC, setting up a potentially historic share sale for investors ready to jump into AI.

item.title: Trump administration plans to drop DOJ's $1.8B 'lawfare' fund, reports say
item.description: Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer said he was launching an effort to kill "slush fund" by forcing Republicans to vote on it.

item.title: McDonald's unveils new global growth strategy to win over diners as competition rises
item.description: McDonald's new growth plan comes as inflation and high gas prices mean restaurants are competing for a smaller pool of customers.
